name: Feature request
about: Propose a practical workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / 要解决的问题

What part of the workflow feels slow, unclear, or repetitive?

## Proposed Improvement / 建议改进

Describe the smallest useful change first.

## Why It Matters / 为什么值得做

- 

## Constraints / 约束

- Keep it as a personal tool
- Keep manual review in the loop
- Do not weaken Anki duplicate handling by `Front`

## Extra Context / 补充说明

- Mockup, screenshot, sample words, or related issue links.
